prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, controlled pacing with deliberate cuts and extended holds.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm light falls across two crouched soldiers and the pale robe of the crucified figure above, while the surrounding scene drops into deep brown-black shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
Two Roman soldiers in bronze armour are crouched low on bare grey stone at the foot of a rough wooden cross, pale carved dice set on the stone between them and a heap of stripped dust-coloured garments pooled at the lower-left. On the cross above, the robed lower body and nailed bare feet of the crucified Christ are just within the upper frame, a white robe and deep-red mantle draped about him. Deep shadow fills the rest of the scene. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — two soldiers crouched at the foot of the cross, dice on the stone, the crucified figure above.

Cut to mid framing — the two crouched soldiers over the dice on the bare stone.

Cut to insert — the pale carved dice set on the grey stone between them.

Cut to close-up — the nearer soldier's weathered face beneath his helmet.

Cut to insert — the soldiers' open hands above the dice, fingers spread and still.

Cut to lower framing — the heap of stripped dust-coloured garments at the lower-left.

Cut to upper framing — the nailed bare feet of the crucified Christ on the wooden cross above.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the crucified figure above the two gamblers.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Oblivious fulfilment beneath the cross.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — two soldiers crouched at the foot of the cross, dice on stone, crucified figure above
Cut to mid framing — the two crouched soldiers over the dice on bare stone
Cut to insert — pale carved dice set on the grey stone between them
Cut to close-up — nearer soldier's weathered face beneath his helmet
Cut to insert — soldiers' open hands above the dice, fingers spread and still
Cut to lower framing — heap of stripped dust-coloured garments at lower-left
Cut to upper framing — nailed bare feet of the crucified Christ on the cross above
Return to full composition, end hold on the crucified figure above the two gamblers
